jam.notes: to be — the most common verb in any language. Auxiliary, copula, existential.

kam.notes: to have — second most common. Auxiliary for compound tenses.

bej.notes: to make/do — extremely high frequency, light verb in many constructions.

dua.notes: to want/love — high frequency, modal-like ('do you want to' = 'a do të').

shoh.notes: to see — among the top perception verbs.

them.notes: to say — high frequency in reported speech.

punoj.notes: to work — common, but not core.

flas.notes: to speak — high frequency in conversation.

mund.notes: to be able — modal, very common in 'mund të'.

duhet.notes: must — modal, defective (3sg/3pl only) but extremely common.

pi.notes: to drink — basic action verb but less frequent than to eat in many corpora.

pjek.notes: to bake/roast — domain-specific (cooking), low frequency in general text.

djeg.notes: to burn — domain-specific, low frequency in general text.

shkoj.notes: to go — top-5 motion verb, ubiquitous.

mesoj.notes: to learn / to teach — high frequency in education contexts.

lexoj.notes: to read — common in textbooks and instructions.

kerkoj.notes: to look for / to ask — frequent in service / search contexts.

fitoj.notes: to win — common in sport, gain contexts.

degjoj.notes: to listen / to hear — perception verb, common.

filloj.notes: to begin — common in narrative / instructional.

shtoj.notes: to add — common in instructions, math, descriptions.

kendoj.notes: to sing — common cultural / musical verb.

tregoj.notes: to tell / to show — high-frequency communication verb.

besoj.notes: to believe — common in opinion / faith contexts.

siguroj.notes: to ensure / to secure — common in formal / promise contexts.

mbroj.notes: to defend / to protect — common in legal, sport, military contexts.

shpejtoj.notes: to hurry / to speed up — moderate frequency.

pranoj.notes: to accept — common in formal / agreement contexts.

bisedoj.notes: to converse / talk — common social verb.

perfundoj.notes: to conclude / finish — common formal verb.

organizoj.notes: to organize — common in formal/business contexts.

ndaloj.notes: to forbid / halt — common in legal and traffic contexts.

krijoj.notes: to create — common in formal/creative contexts.

lejoj.notes: to permit — common in legal/permission contexts.

vendos.notes: to decide / to place — high-frequency Class 2 verb.

terheq.notes: to pull / attract — common Class 2 with three-stem alternation.

ngrij.notes: to freeze / rise — common across senses.

respektoj.notes: to respect — common in social/formal contexts.

njoftoj.notes: to inform — common formal communication verb.

zhvilloj.notes: to develop — common in formal/business contexts.

dyshoj.notes: to doubt — moderate frequency cognition verb.

kontrolloj.notes: to control / check — common in formal contexts.

prish.notes: to spoil / break — common change-of-state verb.

vesh.notes: to dress / wear — common daily verb.

ndez.notes: to light / ignite — common daily verb.

vertetoj.notes: to prove / confirm — common formal verb.

drejtoj.notes: to direct / steer — common in formal contexts.

godit.notes: to hit / strike — common Class 2 verb.

shqyrtoj.notes: to examine / review — common formal verb.

nxis.notes: to encourage / incite — common Class 2 verb.
